tags.description: César Chávez Park, built on the site of a former landfill, offers a wide range of recreational opportunities in a marina setting with spectacular views of the three bay bridges, Alcatraz, and Angel Island.
tags.name: César Chávez Park

tags.description: Halcyon Commons is a community-designed mini-park featuring a large grassy area surrounded by flowering shrubs and trees, a picnic area, and a tire swing.
tags.name: Halcyon Commons Park

tags.description: Terrace View Park, located high in the hills and comprised of three levels, offers a variety of recreational opportunities, space for picnicking, and tot and school-age play areas.
tags.name: Terrace View Park

tags.note: includes city-owned parkland and easments on adjacent private land; parts of western boundary are approximate

tags.description: Strawberry Creek Park offers recreational opportunities, including basketball, tennis, and volleyball, as well as a school-age play area and space for picnicking.
tags.name: Strawberry Creek Park

tags.description: Charlie Dorr Mini-Park provides a tot playground, picnic areas with gazebo, and lawn area.
tags.name: Charlie Dorr Mini Park

tags.name: Berkeley Rose Garden

tags.name: Codornices Park

tags.name: Cragmont Park

tags.description: Frederick Mini-Park offers a simple green area for moments of respite.
tags.name: Frederick Park

tags.description: Great Stoneface Park is one of Berkeley’s rock parks in the Northbrae area, providing great views and challenges for rock climbing beginners.
tags.name: Great Stoneface Park

tags.description: Grizzly Peak Park provides a half basketball court, slide, sandpit, and picnic table.
tags.name: Grizzly Peak Park

tags.description: Grotto Rock Park is one of Berkeley’s rock parks in the Northbrae area, providing great views and challenges for early-level rock climbing.
tags.name: Grotto Rock Park

tags.description: Harrison Park provides recreational opportunities at two fields for different field sports and nearby skateboarding and in-line skating at the Skate Park.

tags.name: Mortar Rock Park

tags.description: Oak Park is a landscaped open space offers a pleasant place to sit.
